description: Composite viewing on an illuminator: two radiograph films with registered weld images (D 1.4 + D 1.5) glide together and superimpose into a visibly darker stack tagged D ≈ 2.9; transmitted-light arrows thin over the stack; equation row 1.4 + 1.5 ≈ 2.9 beneath. Code minimums left to the beat note chip.
